title: Review split skill source change for regression risk and completeness
description: Perform final review of the implementation, tests, and documentation to confirm the source/destination split is coherent, operator exceptions are preserved exactly where required, and no behavior regressions remain in subagent runtime discovery.
acceptance_criteria: Review confirms `memory` and `spec-management` remain operator-facing exceptions in repo-root `.agents/skills/`.
Review confirms subagent-only Codex skills are sourced from `templates/skills/` yet still copied into execution roots under the backend skills directory.
Review confirms the shared test and documentation follow-ups cover the main regression surfaces before signoff.
